name: map-carousel
title: Map Carousel
author: mcpcn
description: Interactive map with location markers and a draggable carousel of cards.

files.content:
// Demo data for Map category components
// This file contains sample data used for component previews and documentation

export const demoMapLocations = [
  {
    coordinates: [37.7935, -122.3938] as [number, number],
    id: "1",

  {

    id: "5",

    rating: 8.9,

export const demoMapCenter: [number, number] = [37.7749, -122.4194];
export const demoMapZoom = 12;

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release with interactive map and location cards
changelog.1.1.0: Made image and price fields optional in Location interface
changelog.1.2.0: Moved to map category for better organization
changelog.1.2.1: Removed Next.js dependency - now uses React-only lazy loading for map components
changelog.1.2.2: Updated Props interface with decorative header and sub-parameter JSDoc documentation
changelog.1.2.3: Fixed defensive property access to handle empty objects and null values
changelog.1.3.0: Added display modes (inline/fullscreen) with split-screen layout, filters, and ChatGPT host integration
changelog.1.4.0: Made filters fully configurable via data prop with custom filter sections and match functions
changelog.2.0.0: BREAKING: Removed onExpand and onFiltersApply actions. Expand and filter apply are now internal.
changelog.2.0.1: Removed default content data - component only renders explicitly provided data
changelog.2.0.2: Migrated from OpenAI Apps SDK to MCP Apps protocol for host communication
changelog.2.0.3: Fixed Leaflet CSS injection deduplication and hardcoded date display
changelog.2.0.4: Adjusted demo map zoom level to show more of the San Francisco bay area
changelog.2.1.0: Added demo data defaults - component renders demo content when no data prop is provided
changelog.2.1.1: Fixed react-leaflet Invalid hook call errors by using React.lazy instead of useEffect dynamic imports
changelog.2.1.2: Fixed Invalid hook call errors by replacing react-leaflet with vanilla leaflet API
